title: docs: update README — 2026-07-20
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: News from the garden
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News section has been refreshed with today's small signal from the hive. The front door stays current; the bees remain methodical.
gist.summary: Updated the root README's Latest News section for 2026-07-20, keeping the project's public activity feed current.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the latest pollinations.ai news directly in the README.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a tiny newsroom gardener pinning a fresh pixel-news note onto a cozy README bulletin board, surrounded by flowers and small code-plants. The scene represents the repository front page being kept current, with lime green prominently framing the board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny reporter cap, pinning a fresh "LATEST NEWS" note to a glowing retro README bulletin board beside blooming code-plants and flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, subtle CRT glow, emotionally warm.
